verses.text: The tribal portions begin from the north — Dan, Asher, Naphtali — each a band across the land. Ordered inheritance. God assigns to every tribe its appointed place.
The tribal portions begin from the north — Dan, Asher, Naphtali — each a band across the land. Ordered inheritance. God assigns to every tribe its appointed place.
The tribal portions begin from the north — Dan, Asher, Naphtali — each a band across the land. Ordered inheritance. God assigns to every tribe its appointed place.
Then Manasseh, Ephraim, Reuben, and Judah receive their portions. Fair division. None is forgotten in the sharing of the land.
Then Manasseh, Ephraim, Reuben, and Judah receive their portions. Fair division. None is forgotten in the sharing of the land.
Then Manasseh, Ephraim, Reuben, and Judah receive their portions. Fair division. None is forgotten in the sharing of the land.
Then Manasseh, Ephraim, Reuben, and Judah receive their portions. Fair division. None is forgotten in the sharing of the land.
The holy oblation is set in the midst, with the sanctuary at its centre and the priests' portion about it. God at the centre. His sanctuary stands at the heart of the land.
The holy oblation is set in the midst, with the sanctuary at its centre and the priests' portion about it. God at the centre. His sanctuary stands at the heart of the land.
The holy oblation is set in the midst, with the sanctuary at its centre and the priests' portion about it. God at the centre. His sanctuary stands at the heart of the land.
It is for the priests of the sons of Zadok, who 'kept my charge' and went not astray. Faithfulness honoured. The most holy portion goes to those who stayed true.
It is for the priests of the sons of Zadok, who 'kept my charge' and went not astray. Faithfulness honoured. The most holy portion goes to those who stayed true.
The Levites have their portion beside the priests', and a tract is set for the city, its dwellings and suburbs. Place for all. God provides for ministers and citizens alike.
The Levites have their portion beside the priests', and a tract is set for the city, its dwellings and suburbs. Place for all. God provides for ministers and citizens alike.
The Levites have their portion beside the priests', and a tract is set for the city, its dwellings and suburbs. Place for all. God provides for ministers and citizens alike.
The city's measures are foursquare with its suburbs, and the produce feeds those who serve it. Provision for workers. God appoints sustenance for the city's servants.
The city's measures are foursquare with its suburbs, and the produce feeds those who serve it. Provision for workers. God appoints sustenance for the city's servants.
The city's measures are foursquare with its suburbs, and the produce feeds those who serve it. Provision for workers. God appoints sustenance for the city's servants.
They that serve the city come from all the tribes; the whole oblation is foursquare. Shared labour. The common good is the care of all the tribes together.
They that serve the city come from all the tribes; the whole oblation is foursquare. Shared labour. The common good is the care of all the tribes together.
The land on either side of the holy oblation belongs to the prince, beside the city's possession. The ruler's portion. The prince has his place, distinct from the holy and the common.
The land on either side of the holy oblation belongs to the prince, beside the city's possession. The ruler's portion. The prince has his place, distinct from the holy and the common.
The remaining tribes — Benjamin, Simeon, Issachar, Zebulun, and Gad — each receive a portion. Complete division. Every tribe has its inheritance secured.
The remaining tribes — Benjamin, Simeon, Issachar, Zebulun, and Gad — each receive a portion. Complete division. Every tribe has its inheritance secured.
The remaining tribes — Benjamin, Simeon, Issachar, Zebulun, and Gad — each receive a portion. Complete division. Every tribe has its inheritance secured.
The remaining tribes — Benjamin, Simeon, Issachar, Zebulun, and Gad — each receive a portion. Complete division. Every tribe has its inheritance secured.
The remaining tribes — Benjamin, Simeon, Issachar, Zebulun, and Gad — each receive a portion. Complete division. Every tribe has its inheritance secured.
The south border reaches to the waters of strife; this is the land to be divided by lot. By God's appointment. The inheritance is portioned as the Lord directs.
The south border reaches to the waters of strife; this is the land to be divided by lot. By God's appointment. The inheritance is portioned as the Lord directs.
The city's gates go out on the north, named for Reuben, Judah, and Levi. Tribal gates. The names of God's people mark the entrances of the city.
The city's gates go out on the north, named for Reuben, Judah, and Levi. Tribal gates. The names of God's people mark the entrances of the city.
Three gates open on the east, south, and west, named for the tribes of Israel. Open on every side. The city of God welcomes His people from all directions.
Three gates open on the east, south, and west, named for the tribes of Israel. Open on every side. The city of God welcomes His people from all directions.
Three gates open on the east, south, and west, named for the tribes of Israel. Open on every side. The city of God welcomes His people from all directions.
The city measures eighteen thousand round about, and its name from that day shall be 'THE LORD IS THERE.' Jehovah Shammah. The crown of every promise is the abiding presence of God among His people.
